name: Turkey-Chutney Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup HELLMANN'S Real or Light Mayonnaise
2 tbsp HELLMANN'S Real or Light Mayonnaise
Toppings: Roasted and Salted Cashews, Toasted Coconut, Raisins, Sliced Green Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first four ingredients in a container of an electric blender and process until smooth. Set aside.
2. Brush both sides of the turkey with the remaining 2 tablespoons of mayonnaise.
3. Heat a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add the turkey and cook for 5 to 6 minutes on each side, or until browned and cooked through. Cut into thin strips.
4. Combine the turkey, cantaloupe, grapes, celery, and ginger with the mayonnaise mixture in a large bowl. Toss well and serve over lettuce leaves. Add toppings if desired.
